message:
feat(config): Add pane filtering with include/exclude rules

- Add PaneFilterConfig with include/exclude rule support
- Implement PaneFilterRule with glob and regex matching
- Add domain, title, and cwd pattern matching
- Exclude rules take precedence over include rules
- Add 15 comprehensive unit tests for pane filtering
- Fix duplicate SearchResult struct in storage.rs
- Add missing query_agent_session functions in storage.rs

Closes: wa-4vx.9.7

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
